description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a large, white, horned head that serves as the handle, giving it a unique and whimsical appearance. The blade is metallic, straight, and tapers to a sharp point, emerging from the side of the blue, textured lower section that resembles a body or hilt. The handle is smooth and rounded, with two prominent upward-curving horns, and lacks any visible grip texture or guard. The lower section is dark blue with a subtle scale-like pattern, adding visual interest and contrast to the otherwise minimalist design. The sword appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a matte finish and hard surface. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on the blade or handle, and no sheath is present.
description: A whimsical sword with a large, horned white handle and a straight metallic blade emerging from a blue, textured lower section. The design is minimalist and stylized, with no visible ornamentation or sheath.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full horned handle and the blade extending diagonally from the blue lower section.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the blade's thin profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the two large horns, black eye-like markings, and the blade partially visible on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blade's length and the curvature of the handle's horn.
attribute_handle_design: large, rounded, white, horned, smooth plastic
